AI&ML

# Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

Established 2020

[Faculty](/departments/ai-ml/faculty)[Apply Now](/admissions)

## Vision & Mission

### Vision

To create leaders in AI and ML who will drive innovation and shape the future of intelligent systems.

### Mission

* Provide cutting-edge education in artificial intelligence and machine learning
* Foster research in deep learning, neural networks, and data science
* Develop professionals capable of solving real-world problems using AI
* Promote ethical AI practices and responsible innovation

## Programs Offered

### B.E. Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning

Duration: 4 yearsIntake: 60

## Labs & Facilities

### Laboratories

* AI/ML Lab
* Deep Learning Lab
* Data Science Lab
* Computer Vision Lab
* NLP Lab
* Research Lab

### Facilities

* GPU-enabled workstations
* Cloud computing resources
* AI software and frameworks
* Collaborative learning spaces
* Research library access
